/usr/bin/ar qc libengine_lib.a CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/collision/CollisionSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/core/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/ecs/systems/PhysicsSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/ecs/systems/RenderSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/input/InputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/renderer/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/renderer/DebugDraw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/renderer/ShaderProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/renderer/SpriteBatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/renderer/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/renderer/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine_lib.dir/src/scene/SceneManager.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libengine_lib.a
